💎 Diamond Elite Membership

For the ultimate movie lover.

Enjoy an all-access cinematic lifestyle with every visit:

✅ Priority Line Access – Skip the wait every time

💳 Diamond Elite Card – Your VIP identity

🍿 Unlimited Popcorn – Never-ending snack satisfaction

🪣 Premium Popcorn Bucket – Exclusive and collectible

🎬 Access to Exclusive Premieres – Be among the first to see select movies

🎟️ Reserved Seating – Priority access to reserved seating - 1 hour advanced notice required

🚗 Dedicated Parking Spots – When available, arrive in style - must call ahead 1 hour in advance

🗳️ Movie Choice Influencer – You're not just a viewer - You're a voice

👕 Exclusive Apparel – A special gift after your 1-year anniversary

⭐ Enhanced Rewards – Earn more with every visit

🎞️ Unlimited Movies – Watch as much as you want

🎟️ Discounts on VR & Guest Movie Tickets – Share the fun and save

🎫 5 Monthly Guest Tickets – Bring your friends along

🎥 Unlimited Movie Membership

Your everyday movie pass — simple, rewarding, and packed with value.

Enjoy nonstop entertainment with essential perks made for true movie fans:

🎞️ Unlimited Movies – Watch as many movies as you want, anytime

🎁 Birthday Popcorn – A free treat to celebrate your special day

🎟️ Discounts on VR & Guest Movie Tickets – Share the fun and save

⭐ Points on Every Purchase – Earn rewards every time you visit

Perfect for regular moviegoers who want freedom, flexibility, and a few extra treats.

YOSEMITE VR TICKETS
The Virtual Reality Experience is unfortunately not included in the monthly membership price. We are however offering members and their guests discounted ticket pricing. Members purchasing tickets will enjoy substantial discounts and additional tickets for guests (children and adults) will enjoy $2 off per guest ticket. VR Tickets must be purchased with a current membership account - discounts will be reflected at checkout.


Please visit the website, Yosemi

C_membership_bottom_body.bodyPreview:
Yosemite Cinema app, or concessions area for current ticket prices for VR films. 


Curious about Yosemite VR? Visit our FAQ page for more information!


DAY PASSES



NOT A MEMBER YET?
Just visiting the area? No problem!


Whether you're just visiting the area or aren't ready to commit to a monthly membership, Yosemite Cinema wants to make sure you don't miss out on any of the fun! We offer a Day Pass option for visitors & their guests. You can purchase tickets at our concessions area as well, just make sure to arrive 15 minutes early or 30 minutes for new films. Simply create a guest account online and choose the Day Pass option. (If you're not a member, a day pass must be purchased for ticket purchasing) Only 1 person in your group needs to purchase the Day Pass - you are then a member for that day.  The Day Pass holder can then purchase as many tickets as needed for that day, for all parties in your group.  Your Day Pass gets you unlimited movie watching for the day of purchase.


DAY PASS

Unlimited movie watching for the day of purchase
$18.00
GUEST TICKETS
Additional guest tickets can be purchased with a guest pass
Adult: $10.00
Child: $7.00
Age 2-12
Mantinee: $7.00
Before 5:00pm
VR TICKET INFORMATION
VR Ticket information and pricing are available by visiting the VR Experiences area of the website and choosing a time - this will open up a new screen with pricing information for children and adults. VR films vary in content and length, so prices are listed accordingly for children and adults.  


Curious about Yosemite VR? Visit our FAQ page for more information!
